sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame
after = last_transition.after_frame

# Compare gray button elements
print("=== Before: gray (w) objects ===")
for n in before.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'w':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

print("\n=== After: gray (w) objects ===")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'w':
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check timer
print("\n=== Timer bar ===")
for n in before.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] < 70:
        print(f"  Before: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
for n in after.segmentation['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] < 70:
        print(f"  After: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

- Center: horizontal (42, 35-37) + vertical (44-46, 36) ← I clicked the vertical one and it disappeared

Now the center vertical bar is gone. Let me check if clicking the horizontal bars does something different, or if I need to click all the gray bars to clear them.

Let me try clicking the other gray elements to see if they also disappear.
